list.name: mr_job_id
list.label: MR Job ID
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT job_id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT job_id FROM mr_job_metrics UNION SELECT DISTINCT job_id FROM mr_task_metrics) t ORDER BY job_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT job_id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT job_id FROM mr_job_metrics UNION SELECT DISTINCT job_id FROM mr_task_metrics) t ORDER BY job_id

panels.title: Job Level Metrics (History Server / MR Collector)

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT job_id) AS value FROM mr_job_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id)

SELECT ROUND(AVG(elapsed_time_ms)) AS value FROM mr_job_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND elapsed_time_ms IS NOT NULL AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id)

SELECT ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN state='SUCCEEDED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT job_id), 0), 1) AS value FROM mr_job_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id)

SELECT SUM(launched_maps) AS value FROM mr_job_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND launched_maps IS NOT NULL AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id)

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, SUM(hdfs_bytes_read) AS 'HDFS Read' FROM mr_job_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND hdfs_bytes_read IS NOT NULL AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, SUM(hdfs_bytes_written) AS 'HDFS Written' FROM mr_job_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND hdfs_bytes_written IS NOT NULL AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, SUM(file_bytes_read) AS 'File Read' FROM mr_job_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND file_bytes_read IS NOT NULL AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, SUM(file_bytes_written) AS 'File Written' FROM mr_job_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND file_bytes_written IS NOT NULL AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, SUM(launched_maps) AS 'Maps' FROM mr_job_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND launched_maps IS NOT NULL AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, SUM(launched_reduces) AS 'Reduces' FROM mr_job_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND launched_reduces IS NOT NULL AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, AVG(cpu_time_ms) AS 'Avg CPU Time' FROM mr_job_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND cpu_time_ms IS NOT NULL AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, AVG(gc_time_ms) AS 'Avg GC Time' FROM mr_job_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND gc_time_ms IS NOT NULL AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT FROM_UNIXTIME(timestamp_ms/1000) AS time, job_id, job_name, user_name, state, elapsed_time_ms, launched_maps, launched_reduces, hdfs_bytes_read, hdfs_bytes_written, cpu_time_ms, gc_time_ms FROM mr_job_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id) ORDER BY timestamp_ms DESC LIMIT 200

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT task_id) AS value FROM mr_task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND task_type='map' AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT task_id) AS value FROM mr_task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND task_type='reduce' AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id)

SELECT ROUND(AVG(duration_ms)) AS value FROM mr_task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND duration_ms IS NOT NULL AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id)

SELECT ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(success_count, 0)) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(COALESCE(success_count, 0)) + SUM(COALESCE(failure_count, 0)), 0), 1) AS value FROM mr_task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND (success_count IS NOT NULL OR failure_count IS NOT NULL) AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id)

SELECT SUM(map_output_bytes) AS value FROM mr_task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND map_output_bytes IS NOT NULL AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id)

SELECT SUM(reduce_shuffle_bytes) AS value FROM mr_task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND reduce_shuffle_bytes IS NOT NULL AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id)

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, AVG(duration_ms) AS 'Avg Duration' FROM mr_task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND duration_ms IS NOT NULL AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, MAX(duration_ms) AS 'Max Duration' FROM mr_task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND duration_ms IS NOT NULL AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, MIN(duration_ms) AS 'Min Duration' FROM mr_task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND duration_ms IS NOT NULL AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, SUM(file_bytes_read) AS 'File Read' FROM mr_task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND file_bytes_read IS NOT NULL AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, SUM(file_bytes_written) AS 'File Written' FROM mr_task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND file_bytes_written IS NOT NULL AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, SUM(hdfs_bytes_read) AS 'HDFS Read' FROM mr_task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND hdfs_bytes_read IS NOT NULL AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, SUM(hdfs_bytes_written) AS 'HDFS Written' FROM mr_task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND hdfs_bytes_written IS NOT NULL AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, SUM(map_output_bytes) AS 'Map Output Bytes' FROM mr_task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND map_output_bytes IS NOT NULL AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, SUM(reduce_shuffle_bytes) AS 'Reduce Shuffle Bytes' FROM mr_task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND reduce_shuffle_bytes IS NOT NULL AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, SUM(map_input_records) AS 'Map Input' FROM mr_task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND map_input_records IS NOT NULL AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, SUM(map_output_records) AS 'Map Output' FROM mr_task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND map_output_records IS NOT NULL AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, SUM(reduce_input_records) AS 'Reduce Input' FROM mr_task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND reduce_input_records IS NOT NULL AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, SUM(reduce_output_records) AS 'Reduce Output' FROM mr_task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND reduce_output_records IS NOT NULL AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT FROM_UNIXTIME(timestamp_ms/1000) AS time, task_id, task_type, job_id, duration_ms, success_count, map_input_records, map_output_records, map_output_bytes, reduce_input_records, reduce_output_records, reduce_shuffle_bytes, spilled_records, hdfs_bytes_read, hdfs_bytes_written, hdfs_read_ops, hdfs_write_ops, file_read_ops, file_write_ops FROM mr_task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id) ORDER BY timestamp_ms DESC LIMIT 200
